description: System configuration - database, vault, git, runtime settings. All swappable.

database.notes: Swap type and env vars to change database. Add new driver to db/ package.

vault.notes: Vault stores encrypted secrets. Key is bootstrap credential, never in DB.

git.notes: Swap host to gitlab/bitbucket. Add driver to gitree/ package.

runtime.notes: Polling 5s to reduce Supabase egress. 1s was causing 8GB+ bandwidth.

github_actions.notes: Uses GitHub's free 7GB runners. Swap driver for local/external.

worktrees.notes: One worktree per parallel agent task. Auto-cleanup on shutdown. Shadow merge before real merge.
